sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n60959" key="kunulagmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κῠνῠλαγμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n60959.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the howling of dogs</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0292.tlg001:85" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stesich.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">85</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
